hero.subtitle: Founder of 4etverg, ex-Engineering Manager at Pipedrive. Fifteen years building products and the teams that ship them. I help companies move AI from demo to dependable.

lingualex.description: A Telegram-native language-learning platform — read adapted, leveled stories and tap any word to learn it, with personalized progress across 16 languages. Built with React and Supabase.

agent-os.description: An orchestration framework for building reliable, multi-step AI agents in production — typed tools, traceable runs, graceful failure.

achievements: Founded an AI product studio shipping agentic tools and LLM-backed products for startups and scaleups.
Lead engagements end to end — discovery, architecture, and a small senior team delivering to production.
Built Agent-OS, an in-house framework for orchestrating reliable, multi-step AI agents.
Advise founders on AI strategy, technical hiring, and zero-to-one execution.
Prototyped autonomous multi-agent development workflows end to end.
Validated the studio thesis that became 4etverg.
Owned the engineering organization across platform, data, and product teams.
Scaled a real-time platform for high-concurrency, low-latency workloads under strict uptime targets.
Established SRE and on-call practice — hardening reliability, payments, and compliance.
Set the technical strategy and hiring bar for the whole organization.
Led cross-functional squads in the core CRM platform used by hundreds of thousands of teams.
Grew and mentored engineers; built hiring loops and a clear career ladder.
Partnered with product and design to ship roadmap features and lift delivery velocity.
Led delivery teams building enterprise software for international clients.
Owned technical quality, architecture decisions, and client relationships.
Mentored engineers and set standards across distributed teams.

contact.title: Let's build something dependable.
contact.body: I take on a small number of engagements at a time — fractional CTO work, AI product builds, and technical advisory. If that's what you need, I'd like to hear from you.
